name: Blake Anderson
description:
Blake has hair with natural brunette roots, hazel eyes, scattered freckles, eyebags, pale skin.

Blake usually wears a red and black baseball tee with the band logo 'My Bloody Valentine,' dark washed blue jeans, red converse and black nail polish on all 10 fingers.

He is bisexual, born male. Born on Mars
creator: gerardwayismyhusband
